description: ODH: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area; cardiovascular and orthopedic ORs minimum 450 sq ft.
citation: Ohio Administrative Code §3701-83-16 / ODH Hospital Rules

description: ODH: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear floor area; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per bed.
ODH: ICU patient cubicle minimum 150 sq ft clear; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
ODH: Emergency treatment spaces minimum 120 sq ft per space; at least one trauma bay minimum 200 sq ft.
ODH: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width; service corridors minimum 6 ft.
ODH: Operating rooms require minimum 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered supply.
ODH: New hospitals and major renovations require ODH Certificate of Need review; ODH plan review required for all licensed health facilities.
citation: Ohio Revised Code §3702.51 — Certificate of Need

description: ODH: Psychiatric inpatient unit individual bedroom minimum 100 sq ft; day room minimum 35 sq ft per licensed patient.
